testcase.name: testFindReservationsByAgentId

22:27:28.734 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.roadready.repository.ReservationRepositoryTest]: ReservationRepositoryTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:27:28.857 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.roadready.RoadreadyApplication for test class com.roadready.repository.ReservationRepositoryTest 22:27:28.934 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

'org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.embedded.EmbeddedDatabaseFactory$EmbeddedDataSourceProxy@7fc7152e'] Database driver: undefined/unknown Database version: 2.3.232 Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: undefined/unknown Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-06-22T22:27:31.310+05:30 INFO 47040 --- [roadready] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists admins cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists brands cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists login_info cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists maintenance_records cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists promotions cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists rental_agents cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists requests cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reservations cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists reviews cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists vehicles cascade Hibernate: create table admins (id integer generated by default as identity, user_id integer not null unique, created_at timestamp(6), phone_number varchar(20) not null, name varchar(50) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table brands (brand_id integer generated by default as identity, brand_name varchar(50) not null unique, primary key (brand_id)) Hibernate: create table customers (id integer generated by default as identity, user_id integer not null unique, created_at timestamp(6), phone_number varchar(20) not null, name varchar(50) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table login_info (id integer generated by default as identity, is_active boolean not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role enum ('ADMIN','AGENT','CUSTOMER'), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table maintenance_records (agent_id integer not null, days_since_last_service integer not null, id integer generated by default as identity, vehicle_id integer not null unique, particulars TEXT not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payments (amount numeric(10,2) not null, payment_id integer generated by default as identity, reservation_id integer not null unique, payment_date timestamp(6), payment_method varchar(50) not null, promo_code varchar(255), payment_status enum ('FAILED','PENDING','SUCCESS'), primary key (payment_id)) Hibernate: create table promotions (discount_percentage integer not null, promotion_id integer generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, valid_till timestamp(6) with time zone not null, promo_code varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (promotion_id)) Hibernate: create table rental_agents (admin_id integer, id integer generated by default as identity, user_id integer unique, created_at timestamp(6), phone_number varchar(20) not null, name varchar(50) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table requests (days_since_last_service integer, id integer generated by default as identity, requested_by integer not null, vehicle_id integer, created_at timestamp(6), resolved_at timestamp(6), description TEXT, request_type enum ('MAINTENANCE','PASSWORD_RESET') not null, status enum ('PENDING','RESOLVED') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table reservations (customer_id integer not null, reservation_id integer generated by default as identity, vehicle_id integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), dropoff_time timestamp(6) not null, pickup_time timestamp(6) not null, optional_extras varchar(255), booking_status enum ('ACTIVE','CANCELLED','CHECKED_IN','CHECKED_OUT','COMPLETED','CONFIRMED','PENDING'), primary key (reservation_id)) Hibernate: create table reviews (rating integer not null, reservation_id integer not null unique, review_id integer generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6), comments TEXT, primary key (review_id)) Hibernate: create table vehicles (agent_id integer not null, brand_id integer not null, pricing_per_day numeric(10,2) not null, vehicle_id integer generated by default as identity, model varchar(100) not null, image_url TEXT, location varchar(255) not null, specifications TEXT, sub_type varchar(255), vehicle_type varchar(255), availability_status enum ('AVAILABLE','MAINTENANCE','RENTED') not null, primary key (vehicle_id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists admins add constraint FK4l5jlwa9nltgbhv94dd5129m3 foreign key (user_id) references login_info Hibernate: alter table if exists customers add constraint FK1pwev9on7gjq5pojv3wlrseye foreign key (user_id) references login_info Hibernate: alter table if exists maintenance_records add constraint FK8hpo25woy0k5mt3kpdjrjv9ko foreign key (agent_id) references rental_agents Hibernate: alter table if exists maintenance_records add constraint FKr0tdwm72b9ldf2jvxq875nay2 foreign key (vehicle_id) references vehicles Hibernate: alter table if exists payments add constraint FKp8yh4sjt3u0g6aru1oxfh3o14 foreign key (reservation_id) references reservations Hibernate: alter table if exists rental_agents add constraint FKqauyxfp0sp4slimo59ogspucs foreign key (admin_id) references admins Hibernate: alter table if exists rental_agents add constraint FKebs16fhkxttpnf05jqj8s59ap foreign key (user_id) references login_info Hibernate: alter table if exists requests add constraint FK4tm3fauu7u28ch1tsx4gok48v foreign key (requested_by) references login_info Hibernate: alter table if exists requests add constraint FKqfm4eweulced4wtrxdhf5liem foreign key (vehicle_id) references vehicles Hibernate: alter table if exists reservations add constraint FK8eccffekcj27jkdiyw2e9r8ks foreign key (customer_id) references customers Hibernate: alter table if exists reservations add constraint FK7s1rlt0ccv2hjeaubf52di8er foreign key (vehicle_id) references vehicles Hibernate: alter table if exists reviews add constraint FK4mjgyh1vc99vaf9l18j2ejc89 foreign key (reservation_id) references reservations Hibernate: alter table if exists vehicles add constraint FKe91cntkvqy0lkc1kn120gaam foreign key (agent_id) references rental_agents Hibernate: alter table if exists vehicles add constraint FKx0jx9pfbo7fwm4l2f90qktjd foreign key (brand_id) references brands 2026-06-22T22:27:31.371+05:30 INFO 47040 --- [roadready] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-22T22:27:31.764+05:30 INFO 47040 --- [roadready] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-06-22T22:27:32.760+05:30 INFO 47040 --- [roadready] [ main] c.r.r.ReservationRepositoryTest : Started ReservationRepositoryTest in 3.835 seconds (process running for 4.596) Hibernate: insert into login_info (is_active,password_hash,role,email,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into rental_agents (admin_id,created_at,name,phone_number,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.reservation_id,c1_0.id,v1_0.vehicle_id,r1_0.pickup_time,r1_0.dropoff_time,r1_0.optional_extras,r1_0.booking_status,r1_0.created_at from reservations r1_0 left join customers c1_0 on c1_0.id=r1_0.customer_id left join vehicles v1_0 on v1_0.vehicle_id=r1_0.vehicle_id where v1_0.agent_id=? fetch first ? rows only
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\ritwi\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: testFindReservationsByCustomerId
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into login_info (is_active,password_hash,role,email,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into customers (created_at,name,phone_number,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select r1_0.reservation_id,c1_0.id,v1_0.vehicle_id,r1_0.pickup_time,r1_0.dropoff_time,r1_0.optional_extras,r1_0.booking_status,r1_0.created_at from reservations r1_0 left join customers c1_0 on c1_0.id=r1_0.customer_id left join vehicles v1_0 on v1_0.vehicle_id=r1_0.vehicle_id where c1_0.id=? fetch first ? rows only
